LanguageData.TITAN_HerdBuff_Tier1.label: Herd Resonance I
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdBuff_Tier1.description: The leader's aura resonates, making kin more agile.
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdBuff_Tier2.label: Herd Resonance II
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdBuff_Tier2.description: The leader's aura resonates, making kin swifter and tougher.
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdBuff_Tier3.label: Herd Resonance III
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdBuff_Tier3.description: The leader's aura reaches its peak — kin gain all-round enhancement.
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdMood_Tier1.stages.0.label: Ten Thousand Beasts Gather
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdMood_Tier1.stages.0.descriptio: Our colony has become a sanctuary for legendary beasts.
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdMood_Tier2.stages.0.label: Court of Titans
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdMood_Tier2.stages.0.descriptio: This is the Court of Titans — domain of the beast kings.
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdMood_Tier3.stages.0.label: Golden Dawn
LanguageData.TITAN_HerdMood_Tier3.stages.0.descriptio: This is the Golden Dawn — the true endgame of Project TITAN. Not a weapon, but a home.
